platform_intro_zh: 此平台整合國際新聞播報、責任審計與博物館式編目，供公共追蹤、研究與教育使用。
platform_intro_en: This platform integrates international news reporting, responsibility auditing, and museum-style cataloging for public tracking, research, and education.
editorial_note_zh: 由沈耀負責最終發布與最終生命責任，十四軸主播與編輯部負責核實、播報、導覽與編目。
editorial_note_en: Shen-Yao holds final release and life responsibility, while the 14-axis newsroom handles verification, reporting, guidance, and cataloging.
